summary.shape_sentence: Morning liquidation from an opening spike, noon capitulation low, then choppy afternoon repair that failed to reclaim the open.

goat.note: Standout move was the sustained morning selloff from the opening spike into the noon low.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots aligned with failed rallies and lower-high continuation during the morning decline.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots appeared mainly after the noon flush as repair attempts, not as a full trend reversal.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 26400-26425 was tested in the afternoon and respected into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 26320-26350 was defended after the noon low and again late day.

time_markers.10am_blue: Already rejecting the opening high and entering bearish continuation.
time_markers.12pm_red: Marked the capitulation low zone near 26324.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon recovery attempt was active but still below the open.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bearish close near 26366, above LOD but far below the opening high.

takeaway: Bearish rejection day: opening strength failed quickly, producing a clean morning liquidation into a noon low, followed by choppy afternoon repair that could not reclaim the open.
